form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Fresh up after three months finished fourth of 9 starters at Wetherby on March 27 over 4800m, 16 len behind Giovanni Change with 73kg at $15. Previously second-up finished third in a small field at Wetherby on October 15 over 3900m, 9 len behind Destination Dubai carrying 68.5kg at $15. Will strip fitter and makes plenty of appeal.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock today. Finished off last campaign 6 of 8 starters at Musselburgh November 28 over 3200m, 19 len behind Nathan Wells with 68kg at $3.10. Previously first up; 4 of 9 runners at Bangor-On-Dee May 17 over 3900m, 5.5 len behind Soldier In Mayo carrying 74kg at $3.30. Best form puts him right in this.

form.formComment: Last start finished fifth of 7 runners at Wetherby on March 17 over 3880m, 10 len behind Rath Gaul Hill carrying 64.5kg at $2.80. Run before finished sixth of 8 starters at Wetherby on February 26 over 3900m, on slow going 24 len behind Largy Force carrying 69.5kg at $6. Strong finish latest and looks a key chance again.

form.formComment: Last start finished tenth of 13 starters at Carlisle on March 22 over 4000m, 50 len behind Wolfburg carrying 64.5kg at $19. The run before fell at this track on March 14 over 4700m. Best form stacks up well.

form.formComment: Useful gelding. Last run finished seventh of 12 starters at Southwell on March 24 over 4100m, 29 len behind Dartmouth Rose carrying 71kg at $11. The start before to post a big 20 len win. Doncaster on February 27 over 3800m defeating Line Of Descent with 67.5kg at $5.50 in a steeplechase. Finds a very nice assignment today and can return to form.
